scripts.preinstall: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); ['package-lock.json', 'yarn.lock'].forEach(f => fs.rmSync(f, { force: true })); if (!/pnpm/.test(process.env.npm_config_user_agent || '')) { console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.rmSync('public', { recursive: true, force: true }); fs.cpSync('artifacts/cnc-website/dist/public', 'public', { recursive: true });"
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
